apps.name: Étienne
apps.subtitle: Your French Hacking Assistant
apps.versionDescription: Initial release with iOS-style interface, French personality, and full ethical hacking knowledge base.
apps.localizedDescription:
Étienne is your personal French-personality coding and ethical hacking assistant. Features include:

• Ethical Hacking roadmap
• Python scripting
• OSINT & Shodan recon
• Tor education
• Dark Web awareness
• Network privacy
• CTF challenges
• SQL Injection & XSS
• Metasploit guide
• Linux commands
• Cryptography

news.title: Étienne v1.0 Released!
news.caption: Your French ethical hacking assistant is here!
